creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
(In reply to pete from comment #7)
Thank you for the prompt reply!

$ uname -ar
FreeBSD z600 10.1-RELEASE-p14 FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE-p14 #14: Tue Jul 14 14:26:13 CDT 2015     root@z600:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MYKERNEL  amd64

Is there anything special in your /etc/make.conf? Here is mine:

WITH_MODULES = kernel zfs opensolaris geom_eli crypto geom_mirror snd_driver snd_ich snd_hea aio coretemp tmpfs aesni if_urtwn linux ums uhid linprocfs

.if (!empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/src*) || !empty(.CURDIR:M/usr/obj*))
.if !defined(NOCCACHE) && exists(%%PREFIX%%/%%CCLINKDIR%%/world/cc)
CC:=${CC:C,^cc,%%PREFIX%%/%%CCLINKDIR%%/world/cc,1}
CXX:=${CXX:C,^c\+\+,%%PREFIX%%/%%CCLINKDIR%%/world/c++,1}
CPP:=${CXX:C,^c\+\+,%%PREFIX%%/%%CCLINKDIR%%/world/cpp,1}
.endif
.endif

DEVELOPER=yes


Here is what I get:
